description: ⚠️ WRITE OPERATION - Confirm with user before calling. This endpoint allows you to create a new webhook for a given group

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the group within the Fivetran system.

url.description: The endpoint URL where webhook events will be delivered.

events.description: List of event types that trigger the webhook.

active.description: Indicates if the webhook is enabled to send events immediately upon occurrence.

secret.description: A secret string used to sign webhook payloads for verification.

type.description: The type of the webhook. Specifies whether the webhook is associated with a group or an account.

url.description: The endpoint URL where webhook events will be delivered.

events.description: List of event types that trigger the webhook.

active.description: Indicates if the webhook is enabled to send events immediately upon occurrence.

secret.description: A secret string used to sign webhook payloads for verification.

group_id.description: Unique identifier for the group associated with the webhook.

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the webhook was created.

created_by.description: Identifier of the user who created the webhook setting.
